subcodes.first_line: My tongue testifieth that there is none other God but Me, the All-Subduing, the Self-Subsisting, and His tongue beareth witness that He Who speaketh [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یشهد لسانی انه لا اله الا انا المهیمن القیوم و یشهد لسانه ان الذی ینطق انه
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @chastisement and requital, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
